first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same, with only minor rephrasing that is consistent with normal run-to-run variation. The model's assessment of the candidate's lack of experience in specific hardware-related areas remains the core of the evaluation in both versions, indicating that the shift in dates (and thus implied age) did not influence the outcome.
